name: registration_opens_09
description: Real-world city arts & rec spring registration announcement with specific open date/time - borderline calendar event

input.subject: Spring 2026 Registration Starts 2/18
input.snippet: Registration Starts at 12PM! Classes are currently viewable online.
input.body_text:
Email from City of Walnut Creek

Registration Starts at @ 12PM! Classes are currently viewable online.

Spring 2026 Registration Starts February 18 at 12:00 PM!

Spring registration is almost here! Now is the perfect time to plan spring activities for you and your family. Make a note of the 5-digit course numbers so signing up is a breeze!

View Offerings and Register Online

Click through all the exciting options available to you this Spring online. If you’d like a printed copy of the Activity Guide, limited quantities will be available at the following locations for pick up, as supplies last:

Civic Park Community Center (1375 Civic Drive)
Tice Valley Gym (2055 Tice Valley Boulevard)
Shadelands Art Center (111 N. Wiget Lane)
Walnut Creek City Hall (1666 N. Main Street)

Look for NEW! classes this Spring marked by red throughout the Guide!

Reference Links
Aquatics Information
Registration Policies
Community Workshops & Social Services
Preschools
Scholarship Information
View Classes Online

To register via phone, Contact Customer Support 925-295-1490 and reference the course number.
Email artsrec@walnutcreekca.gov with any questions.

Section Highlights

Youth Programs
This spring, child and teen programs include ceramics, dance classes, STEM, drama classes, and more!

Explore Community Arts Preschool
Join Community Arts Preschool! Registration for Summer 2026 and School Year 2026–27 classes open on Wednesday, February 18 at 12:00 PM.

Explore Intergenerational
Attend art, music, or cooking classes with your family for these fun and educational intergenerational classes!

Explore Adult Classes
Explore adult programs like ceramics, culinary arts, dance, digital media, and more!

Explore Spring Youth Events
Arts + Rec has tons of fun events for kids and teens this spring!
Family Art Day: Festivals of Spring

Contact Customer Support: artsrec@walnut-creek.org + (925) 295-1490
About Arts + Rec | FAQs | Activity Guide | Registration Policies | Class Locations

City of Walnut Creek | 1666 North Main Street 9259435850 | Walnut Creek, CA 94596 US

notes: Real-world City of Walnut Creek Arts + Rec email announcing spring registration opening. Has a specific date and time (February 18 at 12:00 PM). Also mentions preschool registration opening separately on same date. Models may extract 1 combined event or 2 separate events — both are acceptable (event_count_min=1).
